creator: linimon@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed

We have decided to desupport the floppy builds starting with the 8.0 
release.  The problem is that it was getting harder and harder to keep 
the boot image less than the size of a floppy disk.  Since most modern 
machines have either a CD drive, a USB interface, or both, it seemed 
like too much effort for too little gain. 

You can still build a floppy image by make -D MAKE_FLOPPIES release 
in the release directory. 

The commit in question: 

http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/cvsweb.cgi/src/release/Makefile
